name: BFLocalNotificationPermissionManager
summary: Local Notification permission request + guide alert helper (Swift, ObjC-callable).
description:
BFLocalNotificationPermissionManager provides a simple API to request local notification permission and show a "Go to Settings" guide alert.

- Swift implementation; Objective-C callable
- Built-in English and Simplified Chinese (zh-Hans) localization for guide alert
- Host app must provide appropriate notification usage descriptions in Info.plist
- Follows BFCameraPermissionManager behavior pattern (one-time suppression after system denial)
- Supports standard notification types: alert, sound, badge
